Description: Adaptive sports programming for veterans and individuals with disabilities. Born from 1996 Atlanta Paralympics legacy.
Wheelchair basketball, sled hockey, competitive teams, and recreational adaptive sports. Serves disabled veterans and civilians.
Eligibility: Individuals with physical disabilities incl. veterans

Description: Annual multi-sport event for wounded, ill, injured service members & veterans. 13 sports including powerlifting, cycling, swimming, track & field.
Contact: Through military branch Warrior Transition programs

Description: Wheelchair basketball, rugby, tennis, handcycling, air rifle, and more for paralyzed veterans. Chapters nationwide.
VA-sponsored adaptive sports: Winter Sports Clinic, Summer Sports Clinic, Golden Age Games, Creative Arts Festival, Wheelchair Games, TEE Tournament.
Strength coach certification. GI Bill eligible. Military Support Plan available for active/veteran military.
Personal trainer diploma program. VA approved — accepts GI Bill, VR&E. Hands-on training at multiple locations.
Veteran-focused obstacle course racing community. Training programs and team events for military and veteran athletes.
Cycling, triathlon, running, adventure racing for current/retired/veteran military. 20 regional chapters. Camps, clinics, team competitions. Founded 2009.
Equine-assisted activities for veterans. Therapeutic riding and equine-facilitated learning.
Clinical hippotherapy, adaptive riding, veteran programs for PTSD, substance use, TBI. Peer-to-peer support on the farm.
National credentialing org for equine-assisted services. Directory of accredited centers offering veteran programs — riding, psychotherapy, physical therapy with horses.
Ground program (horse handling, no riding) + Mounted program (riding, horsemanship). Connection, confidence, calm.
Freedom Reins therapeutic riding for veterans. Equine-assisted activities focused on veteran healing.
Free gym memberships, equipment, coaching & wellness groups for post-9/11 combat-injured veterans (50%+ VA rating). 8-week wellness program with nutrition & mental health.
Fitness services, personal training, nutrition counseling, and wellness programs for veterans and first responders.
FREE 6-month program in SW Florida. Up to 60 veterans per session. Supervised training, nutrition education, sleep hygiene, stress management.
Evidence-based exercise prescriptions, nutrition guidance, mindset coaching, social connections. Partnership with YMCA locations.
232,000+ members. Weekly fitness events (running, cycling, yoga, functional fitness), social events, volunteer projects. Chapters in all 50 states.
VA supervised exercise program for older veterans. Available at select VA medical centers with trained staff.
Holistic wellness: health coaching, well-being classes, complementary/integrative health, nutrition, mindfulness. Available at most VA medical centers.
Free or discounted gym services for veterans. Focus on building strength, confidence, and community connections.
6-month gym membership + virtual nutrition coaching for each veteran. Exercise & nutrition as prescription for recovery from PTSD.

Program Name: Wounded Warrior Project — Physical Health & Wellness
Description: Comprehensive physical health programs including fitness coaching, adaptive sports, nutrition support. National reach with local events.
Adaptive golf taught by PGA & LPGA professionals for injured service members & disabled veterans. Physical, emotional, mental & social recovery.
Annual week-long adaptive golf program by VA & DAV. Instruction for veterans with life-changing disabilities.
Free 6-8 week developmental golf curriculum for veterans. Led by PGA professionals. Available at 340+ locations in 47 states.
Golf for mental & physical rehabilitation of post-9/11 wounded veterans. Co-founded by former PGA Tour player.
100% FREE Jiu-Jitsu, Karate, MMA for combat veterans & first responders with PTSD/TBI disability.
Eligibility: Combat veterans & first responders with PTSD/TBI

Description: 100% free martial arts training for veterans, reservists, active duty. Accommodates physical disabilities, ADD, PTSD, TBI.
Free BJJ & fitness training for combat veterans with military-connected disabilities. Operates across all 50 states, 2 US territories, and Japan.
Free medically tailored meals for veterans with chronic disease, PTSD, depression, bipolar, substance use. Personalized by Registered Dietitian. Delivered in refrigerated vans.
Eligibility: Former military with chronic disease/mental health condition

Description: SNAP, WIC, school meals, and other USDA nutrition programs with military/veteran-specific guidance and eligibility.
VA dietitian counseling, food security screening, referrals to community food resources. VHA Food Security Office addresses veteran food insecurity.
Directory connecting veterans to food assistance programs including meal delivery, food pantries, and nutrition services.
Fly fishing, fly tying, rod building for active-duty & veterans. Served 6,000+ people in 2023 with 6,500 volunteers.

Program Name: The Warrior's Keep — Vet-Rec & Keep Climbing
Description: Vet-Rec hiking program + Keep Climbing rock climbing program. Reduces stress, anxiety, depression through outdoor social engagement.
Extreme outdoor adventures: skydiving, mountaineering, scuba, rock climbing. Building veteran communities through adventure.
Wilderness exploration and therapeutic outdoor recreation. Founded by Iraq/Afghanistan combat veterans.
Adaptive surf therapy for seriously ill, injured, and disabled veterans and families.
Curriculum-based surf programs for injured military & veterans. Wellness resources, tools, peer-to-peer support.
Free 12-week surf therapy + yoga + wellness coaching for veterans with PTSD, anxiety, depression. Psycho-education component.
Free classes: meditation, yoga, tai chi, mind-body practices. Individualized acupuncture and mental health counseling.
Free monthly yoga classes, events, and veteran-specific 200-hour Teacher Training. Yoga, meditation, and healing arts for military, veterans, families.
National nonprofit (est. 2011) working with VA. Free daily classes, Mindful Resilience Training for Trauma Recovery, teacher training. Stretching, breathwork, stress management.
Trauma-informed yoga & meditation training for military community. Teachers work in VA facilities, military installations, Vet Centers. Founded 2011.
